Operation 'createZapierWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too brief and lacks critical details. Added information about authentication requirements, expected input parameters (event type examples), return value structure, and side effects (webhook activation). This helps AI agents understand what inputs to provide and what to expect in response.

data.current_description: Create Zapier webhook for specified event
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Zapier webhook for the specified event type. Requires authentication via API key. Accepts the event type as input (e.g., member signup, content published, event reservation). Returns the created webhook object with webhook ID and configuration details. The webhook will begin receiving event notifications immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks critical details. Added information about authentication requirements, expected input parameters (event type examples), return value structure, and side effects (webhook activation). This helps AI agents understand what inputs to provide and what to expect in response.

message: Operation 'deleteZapierWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity about what identifies the webhook to delete, what the response contains, and the side effect of stopping notifications. Enhanced with input clarification (event type or webhook ID), explicit return confirmation, and side effect information for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Remove Zapier webhook for specified event
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing Zapier webhook for the specified event type. Requires authentication via API key. Accepts the event type or webhook ID as input to identify which webhook to remove. Returns confirmation of deletion. The webhook will immediately stop receiving event notifications after deletion.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what identifies the webhook to delete, what the response contains, and the side effect of stopping notifications. Enhanced with input clarification (event type or webhook ID), explicit return confirmation, and side effect information for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getZapierAccountInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and don't clearly convey what account information is returned. Improved summary to be more specific about Zapier integration context. Enhanced description to explain what data is returned (webhooks, configuration), authentication requirement, and the purpose of retrieving this information for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves account information for the Zapier integration, including account status, connected webhooks, and integration configuration details. Requires authentication via API key. Returns the AccountInfo object containing account metadata and current webhook subscriptions. This operation provides visibility into the current state of the Zapier integration for the authenticated account.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and don't clearly convey what account information is returned. Improved summary to be more specific about Zapier integration context. Enhanced description to explain what data is returned (webhooks, configuration), authentication requirement, and the purpose of retrieving this information for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.
